title: Retirement
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'retirement'?
Are you looking forward to your retirement?
What do you think you'll do in your retirement?
Do you think people who retire miss working?
What's the best age for retirement?
What do you think of famous people who come out of retirement?
Would you like to aim for an early retirement?
What do you think of the idea of living on a retirement home?
A retired husband is often a wife's full-time job. (Ella Harris) What do you think?
Do you think the challenge of retirement is how to spend time without spending money?
In what ways do you think retirement might be stressful?
What do you think you'll do more of in your retirement?
Do you think retirement might be the best years of your life?
What problems does a country have if too many of its citizens are in retirement?
Are you putting money away for your retirement?
Is retirement the end of useful life or a new beginning?
Do you think retirement is when you stop living at work and begin working at living?
Retirement is wonderful. It's doing nothing without worrying about getting caught at it. (Gene Perret) Do you agree?
